Merged media-agent module into the main agents library for better organization and maintainability\n- **Fixed tool parts persistence issue** - Implemented `mergeParts` function to prevent tool parts from being overwritten during multi-step tool executions \\(images/credits now persist after page refresh\\)\n- **Updated media agent tools** - Streamlined naming conventions and improved consistency across the codebase\n- **Enhanced folder structure** - Improved organization and fixed import paths across components\n\n## Changes\n\n### Agent Architecture\n- Removed standalone `media-agent` module and integrated into main agents library\n- Updated API route to use new methods for agent observation and tracing\n- Refactored imports and function calls for new structure\n\n### Bug Fix: Tool Parts Persistence\n- Added `mergeParts` function in `chatMessage.repo.ts` to merge parts instead of replacing\n- Prevents duplicate messages when tool calls trigger multiple saves\n- Tool outputs \\(credits, image placeholders\\) now persist correctly after page refresh\n\n### Code Quality\n- Removed deprecated tools and adjusted related components\n- Fixed import paths across various components\n- Removed framer-motion animations from some components to simplify structure\n- Updated documentation to reflect changes\n\n## Test plan\n\n- [ ] Generate an image using the media agent\n- [ ] Verify credits and image placeholder appear during streaming\n- [ ] Refresh page and verify tool outputs persist\n- [ ] Test multi-step tool executions \\(image → edit → resize\\)\n\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\\(https://claude.com/claude-code\\)\nEOF\n\\)\" --base master)","Bash(git push:*)","WebFetch(domain:elements.ai-sdk.dev)","WebSearch","WebFetch(domain:www.npmjs.com)","Bash(npx ai-elements@latest add context)","Bash(npx shadcn@latest add:*)","Bash(yes:*)","Bash(npx tsc:*)","Bash(curl:*)"]
